substance: AI outputs, agent memory, tool-call success, public surfaces, projections, caches, compiled-output previews, scenario state, and world-model state cannot become hidden truth or hidden governance.
Generated-by-agent status is provenance and authority context, not a new artifact family.
Generic AgentOutput truth bucket remains rejected.
Agent handoff may transfer task context but not authority.
World-model state remains Advisory-only unless bridged and accepted through normal governance.
OFARM retains two logical twins, not a third AI/world-model twin.

governanceBoundary: Phase 10 harmonizes and packages; it does not promote draft candidate objects into active law.
